seoTitle: Fishers Hill vs Fishing Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fishers Hill and Fishing Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fishers Hill vs Fishing Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fishers Hill and Fishing Point.
heading: Fishers Hill vs Fishing Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fishers Hill, New South Wales and Fishing Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fishing Point has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Fishers Hill (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fishers Hill or Fishing Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fishers Hill has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Fishing Point scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fishers Hill scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Fishing Point scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fishers Hill or Fishing Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fishing Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
